word: G974 - βιβλιαρίδιον - bibliarídion - bib-lee-ar-id'-ee-on - Little book

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βιβλιαρίδιον

- Transliteration: Bibliaridion

- Phonetic: bib-lee-ar-id'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. a little book

- Origin: a diminutive of G975

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: A diminutive of G975; a booklet: - little book.
